prompt: A state-changing endpoint (/transfer) is authenticated only by the session cookie. What is the correct fix?

options.text: Add a CAPTCHA to the login page
Require a per-session anti-CSRF (synchroniser) token validated on every state-changing request, and set cookies SameSite=Lax/Strict

explanation: A synchroniser token the attacker's site cannot read, plus SameSite cookies, ensures the request was intentionally issued by your own page — the correct fix for CSRF (CWE-352). User-Agent checks are spoofable, HTTPS doesn't prove intent, and a login CAPTCHA doesn't protect this endpoint.
